concepts.headline: Seven free Google AI courses with certificates.
concepts.subtext: Google's free AI curriculum covers fundamentals through app building, each with a certificate.
data_points: AI Fundamentals: core concepts and professional foundation
AI for Brainstorming: evaluate and prioritize ideas creatively
AI for Research: Gemini and NotebookLM for faster sourcing
AI for Writing: turn meeting notes into clear summaries
AI for Content Creation: generate images and videos with Gemini
AI for Data Analysis: track metrics and clean messy data
AI for App Building: build a web app, no code needed
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored layout on a #faf9f6 warm off-white canvas (1200x630px). 64px padding on all edges. Top-left: a 12px DM Mono uppercase label 'FREE COURSES' in #888, letter-spacing 0.07em. Below it, the headline in Inter 600 48px #111, letter-spacing -0.03em, max-width 580px. A 2px horizontal accent bar in #d7c8af, 80px wide, sits below the headline with 20px gap. Vertically stacked list of 7 rows below, each row: a square number badge (28x28px, background #f0efe9, border 1px #e5e5e5, border-radius 0px) with DM Mono 13px #555 number, followed by bold 15px Inter 600 #111 course name and 13px Inter 400 #666 descriptor. Rows spaced 14px apart. Right half (from 660px onward) holds a sparse particle dot network: 14 gray circles 3-6px at opacity 0.08, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes at opacity 0.06. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left in Inter 700 13px uppercase #000, letter-spacing 0.06em.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, body text #333 and #666, number badges #f0efe9 with #e5e5e5 border, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity, label #888, brand mark #000.
concepts.reasoning: Seven sequentially listed courses map perfectly to the numbered_list_graphic modality. The left-anchored stacked layout with square number markers and generous negative space on the right embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint. The particle dot network fills the right canvas without competing with content.

concepts.headline: Google's free AI curriculum, start to finish.
concepts.subtext: Seven courses covering writing, research, data, and app building with certificates included.
data_points: Writing: clean up meeting notes with Gemini
Content Creation: generate images and video
Data Analysis: track metrics and clean data
App Building: ship a web app, no code
concepts.layout_description: 1200x630px canvas, background #ffffff with a subtle #faf9f6 left panel strip (0 to 560px wide) acting as a soft content zone. 72px top/left padding. Top-left: DM Mono 11px uppercase label 'GOOGLE AI — 2025' in #888, letter-spacing 0.08em. Headline in Inter 600 44px #111 below, two lines max, letter-spacing -0.04em. A thin 1px horizontal rule in #e5e5e5 at 200px from top spanning 480px. Feature rows below the rule: each row is a horizontal flex with a 10px square dot in #d7c8af on the far left, bold Inter 600 15px #111 feature category, followed by a colon and Inter 400 14px #555 descriptor. Rows separated by 1px #e5e5e5 hairlines, 18px vertical padding each. Right side (620px to 1130px): empty breathing space with a faint FLYWHEEL watermark at opacity 0.03 in Inter 700 120px rotated 0deg, centered vertically at 320px. Bottom-left: flywheelos.com in DM Mono 11px #888.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, left zone #faf9f6, headline #111, feature names #111, descriptors #555, dot accents #d7c8af, rules #e5e5e5, label and URL #888, watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: Feature list modality suits the course-by-course breakdown where each entry has a named category and short descriptor. The two-zone canvas with a warm off-white left panel and open right space reflects Flywheel's asymmetric balance principle, while the #d7c8af dot markers use the warm sand accent correctly as a structural accent rather than fill.

concepts.headline: Google just made AI education free.
concepts.subtext: Seven certificate courses covering research, writing, data, content creation, and app building with no code required.
concepts.layout_description: 1200x630px canvas, background #ffffff. FLYWHEEL watermark centered at 315px vertical, 120px Inter 700 uppercase, opacity 0.03, letter-spacing 0.02em. Content centered in a 680px wide column starting at 260px from left. Top: DM Mono 12px uppercase label 'FREE CERTIFICATE COURSES' in #888, letter-spacing 0.07em, centered. 32px gap. Headline in Inter 600 56px #111, letter-spacing -0.04em, centered, two lines. A 48px gap. A 2px x 64px horizontal accent bar in #d7c8af centered below headline. 32px gap. Subtext in Inter 400 18px #555, centered, max-width 540px, line-height 1.6. Bottom center: FLYWHEEL logotype in Inter 700 12px uppercase #000, letter-spacing 0.08em, positioned 56px from bottom edge. Left and right sides are entirely empty, enforcing the 60%+ negative space rule. Sparse particle dots in top-right and bottom-left corners only, 6-8 circles at 3-5px, opacity 0.07.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity, label #888, headline #111, accent bar #d7c8af, subtext #555, brand mark #000, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: A bold statement card works when the core message is a single declarative insight. The centered layout with the FLYWHEEL watermark and extreme negative space on either side creates a museum-label stillness appropriate for Flywheel's aesthetic, though it sacrifices the detailed course enumeration of the other concepts.

selection_reasoning: Concept 0 best serves the post's content: seven named courses demand a numbered list treatment where viewers can scan each entry individually. The left-anchored stacked layout with square number badges, DM Mono labels, and a particle dot network filling the right half is the most canonically Flywheel composition. It delivers all seven data points with editorial restraint, generous spacing, and zero decorative excess, exactly matching the premium-publication standard.
